message:
chore(gitignore): Add ephemeral patterns for NTM and test artifacts

Adds ignore patterns for:
- .ntm/ directory used by NTM agent coordination
- test-logs/ directory containing test run output
- test-results.log file with test execution results

These are all runtime/test artifacts that should not be committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -34,3 +34,10 @@ tarpaulin-report.html
 
 # bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
 .bv/
+
+# NTM agent coordination
+.ntm/
+
+# Test artifacts
+test-logs/
+test-results.log
